testcase.name: testFindAll
testcase.failure: org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: expected: <[Product: { id: 1 name: Wireless Mouse price: 25.99 }, Product: { id: 2 name: Mechanical Keyboard price: 79.50 }, Product: { id: 3 name: USB-C Hub price: 45.00 }, Product: { id: 4 name: Gaming Monitor price: 299.99 }, Product: { id: 5 name: Noise Cancelling Headphones price: 150.25 }]> but was: <[]> at
